## ScreenShotPP v0.4.0-rc.1

Release candidate to verify the "capture window that overflows the screen" feature
before the final v0.4.0.

### To verify

- **Off-screen window capture.** With a window that extends past the monitor (a
  window taller than the screen, dragged partly off an edge, or spanning two
  monitors): trigger capture, auto-select that window, and confirm the whole window
  appears scaled to fit — the previously off-screen part is visible and annotatable,
  and copy/save produce the full-resolution window.
- **No regressions.** A normal region drag-select, a window that does not overflow,
  and a maximized window must behave exactly as before (no switch to the window
  view).

Test on Windows first (the macOS window capture ships too but is best verified on a
Mac).
